_captured_at_tag: @c.25.rc7 (feat/c25 PR #39) — refreshed on first CI run
_captured_by: c25-driver Phase 10 GATE CI refresh (baseline taken from .github/workflows/binary_size.yml run 24841534170)

_host.note: CI-anchored baseline. `bytes` / `text` are reproducible at ±5%, `startup_ms` depends on runner I/O contention and can drift up to 10x run-to-run; the +10% budget absorbs that noise across @c.25.rc7. Refresh by running scripts/measure_binary_size.sh --refresh-baseline on a GitHub runner (or re-extracting numbers from a green .github/workflows/binary_size.yml run) and committing the result.

_policy: see docs/STABILITY.md §5.5 (performance is non-contractual) and .dev/C25_BLOCKERS.md::C25B-009. A +10% regression in any of bytes / text / startup_ms fails .github/workflows/binary_size.yml (continue-on-error: true during @c.25.rc7). Hard-fail promotion is a post-stable follow-up.
